```{r bh_dei_combined_rg, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
dt_eng[, firm_targets_fh := as.integer(firm_targets_female == 1L | firm_targets_hispanic == 1L)]

fit_simple <- function(d) {
  extra_fe <- if (any(d$role == "Eng")) " + resp_python + resp_java" else ""
  fml <- as.formula(paste0(
    "sc_overall_z ~ dei_index_z + i(race_gender, ref = 'Blind') + i(race_gender, dei_index_z, ref = 'Blind') + resp_age | resume_index + r_do + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income",
    extra_fe))
  suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(feols(fml, data = d, vcov = ~ responseid)))
}

fit_triple <- function(d, b) {
  extra_fe <- if (any(d$role == "Eng")) " + resp_python + resp_java" else ""
  fml <- as.formula(sprintf(
    "sc_overall_z ~ dei_index_z + %s + I(dei_index_z * %s) + i(race_gender, ref = 'Blind') + i(race_gender, dei_index_z, ref = 'Blind') + i(race_gender, %s, ref = 'Blind') + i(race_gender, I(dei_index_z * %s), ref = 'Blind') + resp_age | resume_index + r_do + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income%s",
    b, b, b, b, extra_fe))
  suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(feols(fml, data = d, vcov = ~ responseid)))
}

flip <- function(m) { m$coefficients <- -1 * m$coefficients; m }

m1 <- flip(fit_simple(dt_hr))
m2 <- flip(fit_simple(dt_eng))
m3 <- flip(fit_triple(dt_hr,  "firm_targets_fh"))
m4 <- flip(fit_triple(dt_eng, "firm_targets_fh"))
m5 <- flip(fit_triple(dt_hr,  "firm_dei_attention_z"))
m6 <- flip(fit_triple(dt_eng, "firm_dei_attention_z"))

all_models <- list("HR" = m1, "Engineer" = m2,
                   "HR " = m3, "Engineer " = m4,
                   "HR  " = m5, "Engineer  " = m6)

demos     <- c("White_Male", "White_Female", "Asian_Male", "Asian_Female",
               "Hispanic_Male", "Hispanic_Female")
demo_lbls <- c("White Male", "White Female", "Asian Male", "Asian Female",
               "Hispanic Male", "Hispanic Female")

coef_map <- c(
  ## --- Block 1: single (level) terms (6 rows) ---
  setNames(demo_lbls, paste0("race_gender::", demos)),

  ## --- Block 2: two-way interactions (18 rows) ---
  ## Demo x Individual DEI Index (Z) (fills all 6 cols)
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z)"),
           paste0("race_gender::", demos, ":dei_index_z")),
  ## Demo x Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1) (cols 3-4 only)
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1)"),
           paste0("race_gender::", demos, ":firm_targets_fh")),
  ## Demo x Firm DEI Attn Index (Z) (cols 5-6 only)
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Firm DEI Attn Index (Z)"),
           paste0("race_gender::", demos, ":firm_dei_attention_z")),

  ## --- Block 3: three-way interactions (12 rows) ---
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z) $\\times$ Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1)"),
           paste0("race_gender::", demos, ":I(dei_index_z * firm_targets_fh)")),
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z) $\\times$ Firm DEI Attn Index (Z)"),
           paste0("race_gender::", demos, ":I(dei_index_z * firm_dei_attention_z)"))
)

gof_custom <- tribble(
  ~raw,            ~clean,        ~fmt,
  "nobs",          "Observations", 0
)

chk <- "\\checkmark"
nox <- "$\\times$"
fe_rows <- data.frame(
  term = c("Display Position FE",
           "Resume ID FE",
           "Resume - Coding Test Version FE",
           "Respondent ID FE",
           "Respondent Age (Cont) and Demographic FEs"),
  V1 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V2 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  V3 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V4 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  V5 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V6 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
names(fe_rows) <- c("term", names(all_models))
## Single-line est+se format -> 36 unique coefs = 36 rows; FE rows (5) sit at 37:41.
attr(fe_rows, "position") <- 37:41

## Inline est+SE format keeps the table to ~42 rows (vs. ~77 with separate
## SE row) so it fits on one landscape page.
modelsummary(
  all_models,
  estimate  = "{estimate}{stars} ({std.error})",
  statistic = NULL,
  stars     = c('*' = 0.1, '**' = 0.05, '***' = 0.01),
  coef_map  = coef_map,
  gof_map   = gof_custom,
  add_rows  = fe_rows,
  escape    = FALSE,
  title     = "DEI Heterogeneity in the Effect of Blinding on Overall Evaluation Score, by Race-Gender (6 cells): Simple, Triple-with-Firm-Targets-URM, Triple-with-Firm-Pays-DEI-Attention.",
  output    = "kableExtra"
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "HOLD_position", font_size = 6) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1,
                     "Simple DEI Heterogeneity" = 2,
                     "Triple: Firm Targets URM" = 2,
                     "Triple: Firm Pays DEI Attention" = 2)) %>%
  ## Block boundaries: single = rows 1-6; two-way = rows 7-24
  ## (Demo x DEI -> 12, Demo x FT -> 18, Demo x FA -> 24);
  ## three-way = rows 25-36 (Demo x DEI x FT -> 30, Demo x DEI x FA -> 36).
  row_spec(6,  extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(12, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(18, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(24, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(30, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(36, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
  row_spec(41, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
  footnote(general = "Standard errors clustered by respondent.",
           general_title = "", threeparttable = TRUE,
           footnote_as_chunk = FALSE, escape = FALSE)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Scissors plot for cols 3-4 of the §4.4 table (HR & Eng triple with Firm
## Targets URM), 6x2 grid: six race-gender groups by HR / Eng (12 panels).
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
cf_hr  <- coef(m3);  V_hr  <- vcov(m3)
cf_eng <- coef(m4);  V_eng <- vcov(m4)

cells_44_rg <- list()
for (i in seq_along(demos)) {
  cells_44_rg[[demo_lbls[i]]] <- c(
    level  = paste0("race_gender::", demos[i]),
    dei    = paste0("race_gender::", demos[i], ":dei_index_z"),
    ft     = paste0("race_gender::", demos[i], ":firm_targets_fh"),
    triple = paste0("race_gender::", demos[i], ":I(dei_index_z * firm_targets_fh)")
  )
}

dei_grid <- seq(-2, 2, length.out = 41)
plot_dt <- as.data.table(expand.grid(role  = c("HR", "Eng"),
                                     group = names(cells_44_rg),
                                     DEI   = dei_grid,
                                     FT    = c(0, 1),
                                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
plot_dt[, c("est", "se") := {
  ix <- unname(cells_44_rg[[group]])
  v  <- c(1, DEI, FT, DEI * FT)
  cf <- if (role == "HR") cf_hr else cf_eng
  V  <- if (role == "HR") V_hr  else V_eng
  list(sum(cf[ix] * v),
       sqrt(c(v %*% V[ix, ix] %*% v)))
}, by = .(role, group, DEI, FT)]
plot_dt[, ':='(lwr = est - 1.96 * se, upr = est + 1.96 * se)]
plot_dt[, FT_label := factor(FT, levels = c(0, 1),
                              labels = c("Firm does NOT target URM",
                                         "Firm targets URM"))]
plot_dt[, group := factor(group, levels = demo_lbls)]
plot_dt[, role := factor(role, levels = c("HR", "Eng"))]

y_lim <- range(c(plot_dt$lwr, plot_dt$upr)) * 1.05
panel_letters <- setNames(LETTERS[1:6], demo_lbls)

scissors_panel <- function(rl, grp) {
  d <- plot_dt[role == rl & group == grp]
  ggplot(d, aes(x = DEI, y = est, color = FT_label, fill = FT_label, linetype = FT_label)) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = -2, xmax = 2, ymin = 0,        ymax = y_lim[2], fill = "#e8f4ea", alpha = 0.4) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = -2, xmax = 2, ymin = y_lim[1], ymax = 0,        fill = "#fbeaea", alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray30", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = y_lim[2] * 0.93, label = "Blinding helps",
             hjust = 0.5, vjust = 1, size = 1.9, fontface = "italic", color = "darkgreen") +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = y_lim[1] * 0.93, label = "Blinding hurts",
             hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0, size = 1.9, fontface = "italic", color = "darkred") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Firm does NOT target URM" = "firebrick",
                                  "Firm targets URM"        = "steelblue")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Firm does NOT target URM" = "firebrick",
                                  "Firm targets URM"        = "steelblue")) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Firm does NOT target URM" = "dashed",
                                     "Firm targets URM"        = "solid")) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 2), ylim = y_lim) +
    labs(title = paste0("Panel ", panel_letters[grp],
                        ifelse(rl == "HR", "1", "2"), ": ",
                        rl, " --- ", grp),
         x = paste0(rl, " DEI (Z)"),
         y = expression(Delta~"Z"),
         color = NULL, fill = NULL, linetype = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
    theme(legend.position  = "bottom",
          plot.title       = element_text(size = 6.5, face = "bold"),
          axis.title       = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text        = element_text(size = 5),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
}

top_row <- (scissors_panel("HR",  demo_lbls[1]) | scissors_panel("HR",  demo_lbls[2]) |
            scissors_panel("HR",  demo_lbls[3]) | scissors_panel("HR",  demo_lbls[4]) |
            scissors_panel("HR",  demo_lbls[5]) | scissors_panel("HR",  demo_lbls[6]))
bot_row <- (scissors_panel("Eng", demo_lbls[1]) | scissors_panel("Eng", demo_lbls[2]) |
            scissors_panel("Eng", demo_lbls[3]) | scissors_panel("Eng", demo_lbls[4]) |
            scissors_panel("Eng", demo_lbls[5]) | scissors_panel("Eng", demo_lbls[6]))

scissors <- top_row / bot_row +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

fig_dir <- here("2_Reports", "figures")
if (!dir.exists(fig_dir)) dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)
plot_file_44_rg <- file.path(fig_dir, "8B_44_rg_scissors.pdf")
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
  ggsave(plot_file_44_rg, plot = scissors, width = 14, height = 5.5, device = "pdf")
))

cat("\\clearpage\n")
cat("\\begin{center}\n")
cat("\\includegraphics[width=\\textwidth]{", plot_file_44_rg, "}\n", sep = "")
cat("\\par\\vspace{0.1em}\n")
cat("{\\raggedright\\scriptsize Marginal-effects ``scissors'' plot built from the §2.1 columns 3-4 (HR \\& Engineer triple with Firm Targets Fem/His), per race-gender. Top row: HR evaluators (Panels A1--F1). Bottom row: Engineer evaluators (Panels A2--F2). Lines: predicted effect of blinding on each group's overall score as a function of the rater's Individual DEI Index (Z); shaded bands are 95\\% CIs (SE clustered by respondent).\\par}\n")
cat("\\end{center}\n")

rm(dt_hr, dt_eng, fit_simple, fit_triple, flip,
   m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, m6, all_models, demos, demo_lbls,
   coef_map, gof_custom, chk, nox, fe_rows,
   cf_hr, V_hr, cf_eng, V_eng, cells_44_rg, dei_grid, plot_dt, y_lim,
   panel_letters, scissors_panel, top_row, bot_row, scissors,
   fig_dir, plot_file_44_rg)
```


\clearpage
## By Trichotomy (Majority vs Gender Minority vs Racial Minority)

```{r bh_dei_combined_axis, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
## Combines §4.1, §4.2, §4.3 into a single 6-column URM-axis table.
## Columns 1-2: simple DEI heterogeneity   (HR | Eng).
## Columns 3-4: triple with Firm Targets URM (firm_targets_fh).
## Columns 5-6: triple with Firm DEI Attn (firm_dei_attention_z).
## DEI proxy:  Index A only (dei_index_z).
## Coefficients flipped post-fit so positive => effect of blinding.

dt_hr  <- firm_long_dt[role == "HR"]
dt_eng <- firm_long_dt[role == "Eng"]

dt_hr [, firm_targets_fh := as.integer(firm_targets_female == 1L | firm_targets_hispanic == 1L)]
dt_eng[, firm_targets_fh := as.integer(firm_targets_female == 1L | firm_targets_hispanic == 1L)]

build_axis <- function(d) {
  d[, urm_axis_blind := fcase(
    treat == "blind",                                                            "Blind",
    treat == "nonblind" & race_gender %in% c("White_Male", "Asian_Male"),         "Nonblind_MaleNonHisp",
    treat == "nonblind" & race_gender %in% c("White_Female", "Asian_Female"),     "Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp",
    treat == "nonblind" & race_gender %in% c("Hispanic_Male", "Hispanic_Female"), "Nonblind_Hispanic",
    default = NA_character_)]
  d[, urm_axis_blind := factor(urm_axis_blind,
    levels = c("Blind", "Nonblind_MaleNonHisp", "Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp", "Nonblind_Hispanic"))]
  d
}
dt_hr  <- build_axis(dt_hr)
dt_eng <- build_axis(dt_eng)

fit_simple <- function(d) {
  extra_fe <- if (any(d$role == "Eng")) " + resp_python + resp_java" else ""
  fml <- as.formula(paste0(
    "sc_overall_z ~ dei_index_z + i(urm_axis_blind, ref = 'Blind') + i(urm_axis_blind, dei_index_z, ref = 'Blind') + resp_age | resume_index + r_do + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income",
    extra_fe))
  suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(feols(fml, data = d, vcov = ~ responseid)))
}
fit_triple <- function(d, b) {
  extra_fe <- if (any(d$role == "Eng")) " + resp_python + resp_java" else ""
  fml <- as.formula(sprintf(
    "sc_overall_z ~ dei_index_z + %s + I(dei_index_z * %s) + i(urm_axis_blind, ref = 'Blind') + i(urm_axis_blind, dei_index_z, ref = 'Blind') + i(urm_axis_blind, %s, ref = 'Blind') + i(urm_axis_blind, I(dei_index_z * %s), ref = 'Blind') + resp_age | resume_index + r_do + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income%s",
    b, b, b, b, extra_fe))
  suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(feols(fml, data = d, vcov = ~ responseid)))
}

flip <- function(m) { m$coefficients <- -1 * m$coefficients; m }

m1 <- flip(fit_simple(dt_hr))
m2 <- flip(fit_simple(dt_eng))
m3 <- flip(fit_triple(dt_hr,  "firm_targets_fh"))
m4 <- flip(fit_triple(dt_eng, "firm_targets_fh"))
m5 <- flip(fit_triple(dt_hr,  "firm_dei_attention_z"))
m6 <- flip(fit_triple(dt_eng, "firm_dei_attention_z"))

## Trailing-space disambiguators so modelsummary keeps each column distinct.
all_models <- list("HR" = m1, "Engineer" = m2,
                   "HR " = m3, "Engineer " = m4,
                   "HR  " = m5, "Engineer  " = m6)

coef_map <- c(
  ## --- Block 1: single (level) terms (3 rows) ---
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp"   = "Male (non-hispanic)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp" = "Female (non-hispanic)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic"      = "Hispanic",

  ## --- Block 2: two-way interactions (9 rows) ---
  ## Axis x Individual DEI Index (Z) (fills all 6 cols)
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp:dei_index_z"   = "Male (NH) $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp:dei_index_z" = "Female (NH) $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic:dei_index_z"      = "Hispanic $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z)",
  ## Axis x Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1) (cols 3-4 only)
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp:firm_targets_fh"   = "Male (NH) $\\times$ Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp:firm_targets_fh" = "Female (NH) $\\times$ Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic:firm_targets_fh"      = "Hispanic $\\times$ Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1)",
  ## Axis x Firm DEI Attn Index (Z) (cols 5-6 only)
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp:firm_dei_attention_z"   = "Male (NH) $\\times$ Firm DEI Attn Index (Z)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp:firm_dei_attention_z" = "Female (NH) $\\times$ Firm DEI Attn Index (Z)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic:firm_dei_attention_z"      = "Hispanic $\\times$ Firm DEI Attn Index (Z)",

  ## --- Block 3: three-way interactions (6 rows) ---
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp:I(dei_index_z * firm_targets_fh)"   = "Male (NH) $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z) $\\times$ Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp:I(dei_index_z * firm_targets_fh)" = "Female (NH) $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z) $\\times$ Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic:I(dei_index_z * firm_targets_fh)"      = "Hispanic $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z) $\\times$ Firm Targets Fem/His (0/1)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp:I(dei_index_z * firm_dei_attention_z)"   = "Male (NH) $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z) $\\times$ Firm DEI Attn Index (Z)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp:I(dei_index_z * firm_dei_attention_z)" = "Female (NH) $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z) $\\times$ Firm DEI Attn Index (Z)",
  "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic:I(dei_index_z * firm_dei_attention_z)"      = "Hispanic $\\times$ Individual DEI Index (Z) $\\times$ Firm DEI Attn Index (Z)"
)

gof_custom <- tribble(
  ~raw,            ~clean,        ~fmt,
  "nobs",          "Observations", 0
)

chk <- "\\checkmark"
nox <- "$\\times$"
fe_rows <- data.frame(
  term = c("Display Position FE",
           "Resume ID FE",
           "Resume - Coding Test Version FE",
           "Respondent ID FE",
           "Respondent Age (Cont) and Demographic FEs"),
  V1 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V2 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  V3 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V4 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  V5 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V6 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
names(fe_rows) <- c("term", names(all_models))
## 18 coefs * 2 (est+se) = 36 rows; FE rows (5) sit at 37:41.
attr(fe_rows, "position") <- 37:41

## Row breaks: dashed line after single-term block (row 6) and before
## three-way block (row 24). 3 single * 2 = 6; (3+9) two-way * 2 = 24.
modelsummary(
  all_models,
  stars    = c('*' = 0.1, '**' = 0.05, '***' = 0.01),
  coef_map = coef_map,
  gof_map  = gof_custom,
  add_rows = fe_rows,
  escape   = FALSE,
  title    = "DEI Heterogeneity in the Effect of Blinding on Overall Evaluation Score, by URM Axis (Male NH / Female NH / Hispanic): Simple, Triple-with-Firm-Targets-URM, Triple-with-Firm-Pays-DEI-Attention.",
  output   = "kableExtra"
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "HOLD_position", font_size = 7) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1,
                     "Simple DEI Heterogeneity" = 2,
                     "Triple: Firm Targets URM" = 2,
                     "Triple: Firm Pays DEI Attention" = 2)) %>%
  ## Block boundaries (dashed) and FE / fitstat boundaries (solid).
  ## Two-way block: 6 (after Axis x DEI) | 12 (after Axis x FT) | 18 (after Axis x FA).
  ## Three-way block: 30 (after Axis x DEI x FT, before Axis x DEI x FA).
  row_spec(6,  extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(12, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(18, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(24, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(30, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(36, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
  row_spec(41, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
  footnote(general = "Standard errors clustered by respondent.",
           general_title = "", threeparttable = TRUE,
           footnote_as_chunk = FALSE, escape = FALSE)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Scissors plot for cols 3-4 of the §4.4 table (HR & Eng triple with Firm
## Targets URM). Replicates the §4.2 scissors using m3 (HR) and m4 (Eng).
## TE_X(DEI, FT) = beta_X + beta_{X x DEI}*DEI + beta_{X x FT}*FT
##                       + beta_{X x DEI x FT}*DEI*FT
## SE via quadratic form v' Sigma v with v = (1, DEI, FT, DEI*FT).
## Coefficients are already sign-flipped, so positive = effect of blinding
## raises the score for that group.
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
cf_hr  <- coef(m3);  V_hr  <- vcov(m3)
cf_eng <- coef(m4);  V_eng <- vcov(m4)

cells_44 <- list(
  "Male (non-hispanic)" = c(
    level  = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp",
    dei    = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp:dei_index_z",
    ft     = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp:firm_targets_fh",
    triple = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_MaleNonHisp:I(dei_index_z * firm_targets_fh)"
  ),
  "Female (non-hispanic)" = c(
    level  = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp",
    dei    = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp:dei_index_z",
    ft     = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp:firm_targets_fh",
    triple = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp:I(dei_index_z * firm_targets_fh)"
  ),
  "Hispanic" = c(
    level  = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic",
    dei    = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic:dei_index_z",
    ft     = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic:firm_targets_fh",
    triple = "urm_axis_blind::Nonblind_Hispanic:I(dei_index_z * firm_targets_fh)"
  )
)

dei_grid <- seq(-2, 2, length.out = 41)
plot_dt <- as.data.table(expand.grid(role  = c("HR", "Eng"),
                                     group = names(cells_44),
                                     DEI   = dei_grid,
                                     FT    = c(0, 1),
                                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
plot_dt[, c("est", "se") := {
  ix <- unname(cells_44[[group]])
  v  <- c(1, DEI, FT, DEI * FT)
  cf <- if (role == "HR") cf_hr else cf_eng
  V  <- if (role == "HR") V_hr  else V_eng
  list(sum(cf[ix] * v),
       sqrt(c(v %*% V[ix, ix] %*% v)))
}, by = .(role, group, DEI, FT)]
plot_dt[, ':='(lwr = est - 1.96 * se, upr = est + 1.96 * se)]
plot_dt[, FT_label := factor(FT, levels = c(0, 1),
                              labels = c("Firm does NOT target URM",
                                         "Firm targets URM"))]
plot_dt[, group := factor(group,
                          levels = c("Male (non-hispanic)",
                                     "Female (non-hispanic)",
                                     "Hispanic"))]
plot_dt[, role := factor(role, levels = c("HR", "Eng"))]

y_lim <- range(c(plot_dt$lwr, plot_dt$upr)) * 1.05
panel_letters <- c("Male (non-hispanic)"   = "A",
                   "Female (non-hispanic)" = "B",
                   "Hispanic"              = "C")

scissors_panel <- function(rl, grp) {
  d <- plot_dt[role == rl & group == grp]
  ggplot(d, aes(x = DEI, y = est, color = FT_label, fill = FT_label, linetype = FT_label)) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = -2, xmax = 2, ymin = 0,        ymax = y_lim[2], fill = "#e8f4ea", alpha = 0.4) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = -2, xmax = 2, ymin = y_lim[1], ymax = 0,        fill = "#fbeaea", alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray30", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = y_lim[2] * 0.93, label = "Blinding helps",
             hjust = 0.5, vjust = 1, size = 2.4, fontface = "italic", color = "darkgreen") +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = y_lim[1] * 0.93, label = "Blinding hurts",
             hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0, size = 2.4, fontface = "italic", color = "darkred") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Firm does NOT target URM" = "firebrick",
                                  "Firm targets URM"        = "steelblue")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Firm does NOT target URM" = "firebrick",
                                  "Firm targets URM"        = "steelblue")) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Firm does NOT target URM" = "dashed",
                                     "Firm targets URM"        = "solid")) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 2), ylim = y_lim) +
    labs(title = paste0("Panel ", panel_letters[grp],
                        ifelse(rl == "HR", "1", "2"), ": ",
                        rl, " --- ", grp),
         x = paste0(rl, " Evaluator's Individual DEI Index (Z)"),
         y = "Effect of Blinding (Δ Overall Z-Score)",
         color = NULL, fill = NULL, linetype = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title       = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
          axis.title       = element_text(size = 8),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
}

scissors <- (scissors_panel("HR",  "Male (non-hispanic)") |
             scissors_panel("HR",  "Female (non-hispanic)") |
             scissors_panel("HR",  "Hispanic")) /
            (scissors_panel("Eng", "Male (non-hispanic)") |
             scissors_panel("Eng", "Female (non-hispanic)") |
             scissors_panel("Eng", "Hispanic")) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

fig_dir <- here("2_Reports", "figures")
if (!dir.exists(fig_dir)) dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)
plot_file_44 <- file.path(fig_dir, "8B_44_scissors.pdf")
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
  ggsave(plot_file_44, plot = scissors, width = 11, height = 4.0, device = "pdf")
))

cat("\\clearpage\n")
cat("\\begin{center}\n")
cat("\\includegraphics[width=0.95\\textwidth]{", plot_file_44, "}\n", sep = "")
cat("\\par\\vspace{0.1em}\n")
cat("{\\raggedright\\scriptsize Marginal-effects ``scissors'' plot built from the §2.2 columns 3-4 (HR \\& Engineer triple with Firm Targets Fem/His). Top row: HR evaluators (Panels A1, B1, C1). Bottom row: Engineer evaluators (Panels A2, B2, C2). Lines: predicted effect of blinding on each group's overall score as a function of the rater's Individual DEI Index (Z); shaded bands are 95\\% CIs from the linear combination of axis-triple coefficients (SE clustered by respondent).\\par}\n")
cat("\\end{center}\n")

rm(dt_hr, dt_eng, build_axis, fit_simple, fit_triple, flip,
   m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, m6, all_models, coef_map, gof_custom,
   chk, nox, fe_rows,
   cf_hr, V_hr, cf_eng, V_eng, cells_44, dei_grid, plot_dt, y_lim,
   panel_letters, scissors_panel, scissors, fig_dir, plot_file_44)
```


\clearpage
```{r perception_triple_helpers, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
## Shared §8 helpers: fit + flip + scissors-data + scissors-plot.

flip <- function(m) { m$coefficients <- -1 * m$coefficients; m }

fit_simple_p <- function(d, factor_col) {
  extra_fe <- if (any(d$role == "Eng")) " + resp_python + resp_java" else ""
  fml <- as.formula(sprintf(
    "sc_overall_z ~ perc_role + i(%s, ref = 'Blind') + i(%s, perc_role, ref = 'Blind') + resp_age | resume_index + r_do + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income%s",
    factor_col, factor_col, extra_fe))
  suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(fml, data = d, vcov = ~ responseid + resume_index)))
}

fit_triple_p <- function(d, factor_col, third_col) {
  extra_fe <- if (any(d$role == "Eng")) " + resp_python + resp_java" else ""
  fml <- as.formula(sprintf(
    paste0("sc_overall_z ~ perc_role + %s + I(perc_role * %s) + ",
           "i(%s, ref = 'Blind') + ",
           "i(%s, perc_role, ref = 'Blind') + ",
           "i(%s, %s, ref = 'Blind') + ",
           "i(%s, I(perc_role * %s), ref = 'Blind') + ",
           "resp_age | resume_index + r_do + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income%s"),
    third_col, third_col,
    factor_col,
    factor_col,
    factor_col, third_col,
    factor_col, third_col, extra_fe))
  suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
    feols(fml, data = d, vcov = ~ responseid + resume_index)))
}

## TE_X(p, q) = beta_X + p*beta_{X:perc} + q*beta_{X:Z} + p*q*beta_{X:perc:Z}
## Returns long-format scissors data with role/demo/Perc/Z and 95% CI.
## Coefs that fixest dropped due to collinearity (e.g. the Eng 3-way Demo:perc:Z
## when only 1 rebel sits in nonblind) are treated as constrained-to-zero in the
## linear combination. The SE is computed from the sub-vcov of the present coefs
## only, so the rebel "Misaligned" line ends up with the same slope in Z as the
## "Aligned" line (no differential slope is identified) plus the perc shift.
build_scissors_dt <- function(model, factor_col, third_col,
                              demos, demo_lbls, role_lbl, z_grid,
                              perc_grid = c(0, 1)) {
  cf <- coef(model);  V <- vcov(model)
  rows <- list()
  for (i in seq_along(demos)) {
    nm_lvl    <- paste0(factor_col, "::", demos[i])
    nm_lvl_p  <- paste0(factor_col, "::", demos[i], ":perc_role")
    nm_lvl_z  <- paste0(factor_col, "::", demos[i], ":", third_col)
    nm_lvl_pz <- paste0(factor_col, "::", demos[i], ":I(perc_role * ", third_col, ")")
    ix      <- c(nm_lvl, nm_lvl_p, nm_lvl_z, nm_lvl_pz)
    present <- ix %in% names(cf)
    if (!present[1]) next  # no main demo coef -> nothing to plot
    cfi <- ifelse(present, as.numeric(cf[ix]), 0)
    cfi[is.na(cfi)] <- 0
    ix_pres <- ix[present]
    Vi      <- V[ix_pres, ix_pres, drop = FALSE]
    for (p in perc_grid) {
      for (q in z_grid) {
        v       <- c(1, p, q, p * q)
        v_pres  <- v[present]
        est <- sum(v * cfi)
        var_v <- as.numeric(t(v_pres) %*% Vi %*% v_pres)
        se  <- sqrt(max(0, var_v))
        rows[[length(rows) + 1L]] <- data.frame(
          role = role_lbl, demo = demo_lbls[i],
          Perc = p, Z = q, est = est,
          lwr = est - 1.96 * se, upr = est + 1.96 * se,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      }
    }
  }
  do.call(rbind, rows)
}

## Two-row scissors grid (HR top, Eng bottom). Per-row legends: each role's
## row has its own collected legend strip with role-specific labels (HR row:
## HR-aligned/misaligned-with-Eng; Eng row: Eng-aligned/misaligned-with-HR).
## "Blinding Boosts/Penalizes [demographic]" annotations are panel-specific.
## y_lim from est range only with a ±2 hard cap so thin-cell CI explosions
## don't squash visible signal; ribbons that exceed get clipped by
## coord_cartesian, central est lines stay visible.
make_scissors_grid <- function(plot_dt, demo_lbls, x_lab, ncol_panels,
                               hr_low_label   = "HR who feel aligned with Eng",
                               hr_high_label  = "HR who feel highly misaligned with Eng",
                               eng_low_label  = "Eng who feel aligned with HR",
                               eng_high_label = "Eng who feel highly misaligned with HR") {
  plot_dt <- as.data.frame(plot_dt)
  plot_dt$role <- factor(plot_dt$role, levels = c("HR", "Eng"))
  plot_dt$demo <- factor(plot_dt$demo, levels = demo_lbls)

  perc_vals <- sort(unique(plot_dt$Perc[!is.na(plot_dt$Perc)]))
  perc_low_val <- perc_vals[1]

  y_lim <- range(plot_dt$est, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.5
  y_lim[1] <- max(min(y_lim[1], -0.5), -2)
  y_lim[2] <- min(max(y_lim[2],  0.5),  2)

  panel_one <- function(rl, dm) {
    d <- plot_dt[plot_dt$role == rl & plot_dt$demo == dm, ]
    if (rl == "HR") {
      low_lab    <- hr_low_label
      high_lab   <- hr_high_label
      high_color <- "steelblue"
    } else {
      low_lab    <- eng_low_label
      high_lab   <- eng_high_label
      high_color <- "indianred"
    }
    d$bucket <- factor(
      ifelse(d$Perc == perc_low_val, low_lab, high_lab),
      levels = c(low_lab, high_lab))
    bcol <- setNames(c("gray40", high_color), c(low_lab, high_lab))
    blty <- setNames(c("dashed", "solid"),    c(low_lab, high_lab))

    ggplot(d, aes(x = Z, y = est, color = bucket, fill = bucket, linetype = bucket)) +
      annotate("rect", xmin = -2, xmax = 2, ymin = 0,        ymax = y_lim[2], fill = "#e8f4ea", alpha = 0.4) +
      annotate("rect", xmin = -2, xmax = 2, ymin = y_lim[1], ymax = 0,        fill = "#fbeaea", alpha = 0.4) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray30", linewidth = 0.4) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.15, color = NA, na.rm = TRUE) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 0.7, na.rm = TRUE) +
      annotate("text", x = 0, y = y_lim[2] * 0.93, label = paste0("Blinding Boosts ", dm),
               hjust = 0.5, vjust = 1, size = 1.9, fontface = "italic", color = "darkgreen") +
      annotate("text", x = 0, y = y_lim[1] * 0.93, label = paste0("Blinding Penalizes ", dm),
               hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0, size = 1.9, fontface = "italic", color = "darkred") +
      scale_color_manual(   name = NULL, values = bcol) +
      scale_fill_manual(    name = NULL, values = bcol) +
      scale_linetype_manual(name = NULL, values = blty) +
      guides(fill = "none") +
      coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 2), ylim = y_lim) +
      labs(title = paste0(rl, " --- ", dm),
           x = x_lab, y = "Effect of Blinding (Z)") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
      theme(legend.position  = "bottom",
            plot.title       = element_text(size = 7.5, face = "bold"),
            axis.title       = element_text(size = 6.5),
            axis.text        = element_text(size = 5.5),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  }

  hr_panels  <- lapply(demo_lbls, function(dm) panel_one("HR",  dm))
  eng_panels <- lapply(demo_lbls, function(dm) panel_one("Eng", dm))

  hr_grid  <- wrap_plots(hr_panels,  ncol = ncol_panels) +
              plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
              theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  eng_grid <- wrap_plots(eng_panels, ncol = ncol_panels) +
              plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
              theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  hr_grid / eng_grid
}
```
# Inter-Departmental Backlash and Compensation: Signed Directional Index

\textit{Spec.} Triple-interaction model with a \textbf{signed, DEI-specific, directional} perception index per role: positive end captures the role-appropriate ``misalignment in the bad direction'' (HR overreach for Eng; Eng undercare for HR); negative end captures the opposite direction. Both directions are continuous, not thresholded.

\textit{Survey directional structure (used directly).} The multi-select options \texttt{aligndiff\{role\}\_1..6} record which DEI dimensions the respondent flagged, and the items themselves are directional:
\begin{itemize}\setlength\itemsep{1pt}\setlength\parskip{0pt}\setlength\topsep{1pt}\setlength\partopsep{0pt}
  \item Options 1 / 4: counterpart places \emph{higher} priority on gender / racial diversity (rebellion-relevant for Eng; over-care-relevant for HR).
  \item Options 2 / 5: counterpart places \emph{lower} priority on gender / racial diversity (under-care-relevant for HR; opposite-direction signal for Eng).
  \item Options 3 / 6: counterpart places priority on \emph{different} groups (no direction --- ignored here).
\end{itemize}

\textit{Index construction} (per role; respondent-level then merged back):
\begin{itemize}\setlength\itemsep{1pt}\setlength\parskip{0pt}\setlength\topsep{1pt}\setlength\partopsep{0pt}
  \item \textbf{Eng (HR Overreach direction).} Likert: \texttt{s5\_hr\_influence} (1--4, ``to what extent does HR push DEI in hiring''; higher = more push). Directional count: $(\texttt{aligndiffeng}_1 + \texttt{aligndiffeng}_4) - (\texttt{aligndiffeng}_2 + \texttt{aligndiffeng}_5)$ (positive = HR cares more on race/gender DEI; negative = HR cares less). Composite: \texttt{eng\_dir = s5\_hr\_influence + 0.5 $\cdot$ directional\_count}, then z-scored within Eng.
  \item \textbf{HR (Eng Undercare direction).} Likert: \texttt{-s5\_engineer\_care} (negated 0--4 ``to what extent does Eng prioritize DEI''; higher negated = Eng cares less). Directional count: $(\texttt{aligndiffhr}_2 + \texttt{aligndiffhr}_5) - (\texttt{aligndiffhr}_1 + \texttt{aligndiffhr}_4)$ (positive = Eng cares less on race/gender DEI; negative = Eng cares more). Composite: \texttt{hr\_dir = -s5\_engineer\_care + 0.5 $\cdot$ directional\_count}, then z-scored within HR.
  \item \texttt{misalign\_z} = \texttt{eng\_dir\_z} for Eng rows / \texttt{hr\_dir\_z} for HR rows, used as \texttt{perc\_role} in the regressions. Sample inclusion: drop only respondents NA on the Likert anchor (\texttt{s5\_hr\_influence} for Eng / \texttt{s5\_engineer\_care} for HR).
\end{itemize}

\textbf{Substantive interpretation.} \texttt{perc\_role} $> 0$ = ``rebellion conditions'' for Eng / ``compensation conditions'' for HR; \texttt{perc\_role} $< 0$ = the opposite direction (Eng who think HR underreaches; HR who think Eng overcares). Triple-interaction slopes can therefore be read as: \emph{how does the effect of blinding on group X change as the rater moves from ``counterpart cares too little on DEI'' to ``counterpart cares too much on DEI''?}

```{r perception_dir_data, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
## §11: signed directional misalignment index.
extra_perc <- c("s5_view_align", "s5_view_aligndiffeng", "s5_view_aligndiffhr",
                "s5_hr_influence", "s5_engineer_care",
                grep("^aligndiff(hr|eng)_", names(firm_dt), value = TRUE))
extra_perc <- intersect(extra_perc, names(firm_dt))

fld <- merge(firm_long_dt,
             firm_dt[, c("responseid", extra_perc), with = FALSE],
             by = "responseid", all.x = TRUE)

fld[, urm_axis_blind := fcase(
       treat == "blind",                                                            "Blind",
       treat == "nonblind" & race_gender %in% c("White_Male", "Asian_Male"),         "Nonblind_MaleNonHisp",
       treat == "nonblind" & race_gender %in% c("White_Female", "Asian_Female"),     "Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp",
       treat == "nonblind" & race_gender %in% c("Hispanic_Male", "Hispanic_Female"), "Nonblind_Hispanic",
       default = NA_character_)]
fld[, urm_axis_blind := factor(urm_axis_blind,
       levels = c("Blind", "Nonblind_MaleNonHisp", "Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp", "Nonblind_Hispanic"))]
fld[, urm_tech_blind := fcase(
       treat == "blind",                    "Blind",
       treat == "nonblind" & urm_tech == 1, "Nonblind_URM",
       treat == "nonblind" & urm_tech == 0, "Nonblind_NonURM",
       default = NA_character_)]
fld[, urm_tech_blind := factor(urm_tech_blind,
       levels = c("Blind", "Nonblind_NonURM", "Nonblind_URM"))]
fld[, race_gender := factor(race_gender,
       levels = c("Blind", "White_Male", "White_Female",
                  "Asian_Male", "Asian_Female",
                  "Hispanic_Male", "Hispanic_Female"))]

resp_dt <- unique(fld[, c("responseid", "role", extra_perc), with = FALSE])

## Cast to plain numeric.
for (col in extra_perc) {
  if (col %in% names(resp_dt)) {
    set(resp_dt, j = col, value = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(resp_dt[[col]])))
  }
}

## Defensive 99 -> NA on the Likert items used in the index.
for (col in c("s5_hr_influence", "s5_engineer_care", "s5_view_align")) {
  if (col %in% names(resp_dt)) {
    resp_dt[get(col) == 99, (col) := NA_real_]
  }
}

z <- function(x) {
  if (sum(!is.na(x)) < 2) return(rep(NA_real_, length(x)))
  mu <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE); sg <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(sg) || sg == 0) return(rep(0, length(x)))
  (x - mu) / sg
}

## Eng HR-Overreach direction:
##   Likert (s5_hr_influence) + 0.5 * (gender+racial overreach - underreach)
resp_dt[role == "Eng",
        eng_dir_count := (aligndiffeng_1 + aligndiffeng_4) -
                         (aligndiffeng_2 + aligndiffeng_5)]
resp_dt[role == "Eng",
        eng_dir_raw := s5_hr_influence + 0.5 * eng_dir_count]
resp_dt[role == "Eng", eng_dir_z := z(eng_dir_raw)]

## HR Eng-Undercare direction:
##   negated Likert (-s5_engineer_care) + 0.5 * (gender+racial undercare - overcare)
resp_dt[role == "HR",
        hr_dir_count := (aligndiffhr_2 + aligndiffhr_5) -
                        (aligndiffhr_1 + aligndiffhr_4)]
resp_dt[role == "HR",
        hr_dir_raw := -s5_engineer_care + 0.5 * hr_dir_count]
resp_dt[role == "HR", hr_dir_z := z(hr_dir_raw)]

## Stitch into a single misalign_z column.
resp_dt[, misalign_z := NA_real_]
resp_dt[role == "Eng", misalign_z := eng_dir_z]
resp_dt[role == "HR",  misalign_z := hr_dir_z]

fld <- merge(fld, resp_dt[, .(responseid, misalign_z)],
             by = "responseid", all.x = TRUE)

## Also persist misalign_z on firm_long_dt so §4.5 (productivity heterogeneity
## by misalignment) can reference it without rebuilding the whole index.
if ("misalign_z" %in% names(firm_long_dt)) firm_long_dt[, misalign_z := NULL]
firm_long_dt <- merge(firm_long_dt, resp_dt[, .(responseid, misalign_z)],
                      by = "responseid", all.x = TRUE)

dt_hr  <- fld[role == "HR"  & !is.na(misalign_z)]
dt_eng <- fld[role == "Eng" & !is.na(misalign_z)]
dt_hr [, perc_role := misalign_z]
dt_eng[, perc_role := misalign_z]

n_h_idx <- uniqueN(dt_hr$responseid)
n_e_idx <- uniqueN(dt_eng$responseid)
```


\clearpage
## By Six Demographics

```{r perception_dir_rg, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
demos     <- c("White_Male", "White_Female", "Asian_Male", "Asian_Female",
               "Hispanic_Male", "Hispanic_Female")
demo_lbls <- c("White Male", "White Female", "Asian Male", "Asian Female",
               "Hispanic Male", "Hispanic Female")
fcol      <- "race_gender"

m1 <- flip(fit_simple_p (dt_hr,  fcol))
m2 <- flip(fit_simple_p (dt_eng, fcol))
m3 <- flip(fit_triple_p (dt_hr,  fcol, "dei_index_z"))
m4 <- flip(fit_triple_p (dt_eng, fcol, "dei_index_z"))

all_models <- list("HR" = m1, "Engineer" = m2,
                   "HR " = m3, "Engineer " = m4)

coef_map <- c(
  setNames(demo_lbls, paste0(fcol, "::", demos)),
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Dir Idx (Z)"),
           paste0(fcol, "::", demos, ":perc_role")),
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Own DEI Index (Z)"),
           paste0(fcol, "::", demos, ":dei_index_z")),
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Dir Idx (Z) $\\times$ Own DEI Index (Z)"),
           paste0(fcol, "::", demos, ":I(perc_role * dei_index_z)"))
)

gof_custom <- tribble(
  ~raw,                 ~clean,                  ~fmt,
  "nobs",               "Observations",          0,
  "r.squared",          "R$^2$",                 3,
  "adj.r.squared",      "Adj. R$^2$",            3,
  "r2.within",          "R$^2$ Within",          3,
  "r2.within.adjusted", "Adj. R$^2$ Within",     3
)
chk <- "\\checkmark"; nox <- "$\\times$"
fe_rows <- data.frame(
  term = c("Display Position FE",
           "Resume ID FE",
           "Resume - Coding Test Version FE",
           "Respondent ID FE",
           "Respondent Age (Cont) and Demographic FEs"),
  V1 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V2 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  V3 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V4 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
names(fe_rows) <- c("term", names(all_models))
attr(fe_rows, "position") <- 25:29

modelsummary(
  all_models,
  estimate  = "{estimate}{stars} ({std.error})",
  statistic = NULL,
  stars     = c('*' = 0.1, '**' = 0.05, '***' = 0.01),
  coef_map  = coef_map,
  gof_map   = gof_custom,
  add_rows  = fe_rows,
  escape    = FALSE,
  output    = "kableExtra"
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "HOLD_position", font_size = 7) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1,
                     "Simple Dir Het." = 2,
                     "Triple: Dir x Own DEI" = 2)) %>%
  row_spec(6,  extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(12, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(18, extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(24, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
  row_spec(29, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
  footnote(general = sprintf(
            "Dir Idx (Z) = signed directional misalignment index: for Eng, HR Overreach direction (Likert + 0.5 times signed multi-select); for HR, Eng Undercare direction. Z-scored within role. Positive = rebellion conditions for Eng / compensation conditions for HR; negative = opposite. n = %d HR, %d Eng. Coefs flipped post-fit so positive = effect of blinding raises the score. Two-way cluster on responseid and resume index.",
            n_h_idx, n_e_idx),
           general_title = "", threeparttable = TRUE,
           footnote_as_chunk = FALSE, escape = FALSE)

z_grid <- seq(-2, 2, length.out = 41)
df_dei <- rbind(
  build_scissors_dt(m3, fcol, "dei_index_z", demos, demo_lbls, "HR",  z_grid, perc_grid = c(-1, 1)),
  build_scissors_dt(m4, fcol, "dei_index_z", demos, demo_lbls, "Eng", z_grid, perc_grid = c(-1, 1)))
fig_dei <- make_scissors_grid(df_dei, demo_lbls, "Own DEI Index (Z)",
                              ncol_panels = 6,
                              hr_low_label   = "HR perceives Eng overcaring on DEI",
                              hr_high_label  = "HR perceives Eng undercaring on DEI",
                              eng_low_label  = "Eng perceives HR underreaching on DEI",
                              eng_high_label = "Eng perceives HR overreaching on DEI")

fig_dir <- here("2_Reports", "figures")
plot_file_dei <- file.path(fig_dir, "8B_perception_dir_dei_rg.pdf")
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
  ggsave(plot_file_dei, plot = fig_dei, width = 14, height = 6.5, device = "pdf")
))

cat("\\clearpage\n")
cat("\\begin{center}\\textbf{Dir Idx (signed) $\\times$ Own DEI Index --- Per Race-Gender (6 cells)}\\par\\vspace{0.1em}\n")
cat("\\includegraphics[width=\\textwidth]{", plot_file_dei, "}\\par\\vspace{0.1em}\n", sep = "")
cat("{\\raggedright\\scriptsize Top row: HR (high Dir = perceives Eng undercare = compensation conditions). Bottom row: Eng (high Dir = perceives HR overreach = rebellion conditions). Bands = 95\\% CI.\\par}\n")
cat("\\end{center}\n")

rm(m1, m2, m3, m4, all_models, demos, demo_lbls, fcol,
   coef_map, gof_custom, chk, nox, fe_rows,
   z_grid, df_dei, fig_dei,
   plot_file_dei, fig_dir)
```


\clearpage
## By Trichotomy (Majority vs Gender Minority vs Racial Minority)

```{r perception_dir_axis, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
demos     <- c("Nonblind_MaleNonHisp", "Nonblind_FemaleNonHisp", "Nonblind_Hispanic")
demo_lbls <- c("Male (NH)", "Female (NH)", "Hispanic")
fcol      <- "urm_axis_blind"

m1 <- flip(fit_simple_p (dt_hr,  fcol))
m2 <- flip(fit_simple_p (dt_eng, fcol))
m3 <- flip(fit_triple_p (dt_hr,  fcol, "dei_index_z"))
m4 <- flip(fit_triple_p (dt_eng, fcol, "dei_index_z"))

all_models <- list("HR" = m1, "Engineer" = m2,
                   "HR " = m3, "Engineer " = m4)

coef_map <- c(
  setNames(demo_lbls, paste0(fcol, "::", demos)),
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Dir Idx (Z)"),
           paste0(fcol, "::", demos, ":perc_role")),
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Own DEI Index (Z)"),
           paste0(fcol, "::", demos, ":dei_index_z")),
  setNames(paste0(demo_lbls, " $\\times$ Dir Idx (Z) $\\times$ Own DEI Index (Z)"),
           paste0(fcol, "::", demos, ":I(perc_role * dei_index_z)"))
)

gof_custom <- tribble(
  ~raw,                 ~clean,                  ~fmt,
  "nobs",               "Observations",          0,
  "r.squared",          "R$^2$",                 3,
  "adj.r.squared",      "Adj. R$^2$",            3,
  "r2.within",          "R$^2$ Within",          3,
  "r2.within.adjusted", "Adj. R$^2$ Within",     3
)
chk <- "\\checkmark"; nox <- "$\\times$"
fe_rows <- data.frame(
  term = c("Display Position FE",
           "Resume ID FE",
           "Resume - Coding Test Version FE",
           "Respondent ID FE",
           "Respondent Age (Cont) and Demographic FEs"),
  V1 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V2 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  V3 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk), V4 = c(chk, chk, nox, nox, chk),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
names(fe_rows) <- c("term", names(all_models))
attr(fe_rows, "position") <- 13:17

modelsummary(
  all_models,
  estimate  = "{estimate}{stars} ({std.error})",
  statistic = NULL,
  stars     = c('*' = 0.1, '**' = 0.05, '***' = 0.01),
  coef_map  = coef_map,
  gof_map   = gof_custom,
  add_rows  = fe_rows,
  escape    = FALSE,
  output    = "kableExtra"
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "HOLD_position", font_size = 8) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1,
                     "Simple Dir Het." = 2,
                     "Triple: Dir x Own DEI" = 2)) %>%
  row_spec(3,  extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(6,  extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(9,  extra_latex_after = "\\hdashline") %>%
  row_spec(12, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
  row_spec(17, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
  footnote(general = sprintf(
            "Dir Idx (Z) = signed directional misalignment index. n = %d HR, %d Eng. Coefs flipped post-fit so positive = effect of blinding raises the score. Two-way cluster on responseid and resume index.",
            n_h_idx, n_e_idx),
           general_title = "", threeparttable = TRUE,
           footnote_as_chunk = FALSE, escape = FALSE)

z_grid <- seq(-2, 2, length.out = 41)
df_dei <- rbind(
  build_scissors_dt(m3, fcol, "dei_index_z", demos, demo_lbls, "HR",  z_grid, perc_grid = c(-1, 1)),
  build_scissors_dt(m4, fcol, "dei_index_z", demos, demo_lbls, "Eng", z_grid, perc_grid = c(-1, 1)))
fig_dei <- make_scissors_grid(df_dei, demo_lbls, "Own DEI Index (Z)",
                              ncol_panels = 3,
                              hr_low_label   = "HR perceives Eng overcaring on DEI",
                              hr_high_label  = "HR perceives Eng undercaring on DEI",
                              eng_low_label  = "Eng perceives HR underreaching on DEI",
                              eng_high_label = "Eng perceives HR overreaching on DEI")

fig_dir <- here("2_Reports", "figures")
plot_file_dei <- file.path(fig_dir, "8B_perception_dir_dei_axis.pdf")
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
  ggsave(plot_file_dei, plot = fig_dei, width = 11, height = 6.5, device = "pdf")
))

cat("\\clearpage\n")
cat("\\begin{center}\\textbf{Dir Idx (signed) $\\times$ Own DEI Index --- URM-Axis Trichotomy}\\par\\vspace{0.1em}\n")
cat("\\includegraphics[width=0.95\\textwidth]{", plot_file_dei, "}\\par\\vspace{0.1em}\n", sep = "")
cat("{\\raggedright\\scriptsize Top row: HR (high Dir = compensation conditions). Bottom row: Eng (high Dir = rebellion conditions). Bands = 95\\% CI.\\par}\n")
cat("\\end{center}\n")

rm(m1, m2, m3, m4, all_models, demos, demo_lbls, fcol,
   coef_map, gof_custom, chk, nox, fe_rows,
   z_grid, df_dei, fig_dei,
   plot_file_dei, fig_dir)
```


\newpage
# Treatment Effect on Productivity of Hired (The Efficiency Myth)

## Does Blinding Lead to More Accurate Coding Skill Evaluations?

\textbf{Takeaway:} Removing demographic information (or noise) does \emph{not} meaningfully improve evaluators' ability to identify top-ability candidates --- signal extraction remains flat.

\textcolor{blue}{\textbf{Specification}}:
\vspace{-0.7em}
$$
\text{Hiring Evaluation Score (Z)} \sim \text{True Coding Ability (Z)} \times \mathbbm{1}[\text{Blind arm}] \mid \text{Respondent FE} + \text{Display Position FE}.
$$
\vspace{-1.4em}
\begin{itemize}\setlength\itemsep{0pt}\setlength\parskip{0pt}\setlength\topsep{0pt}\setlength\partopsep{0pt}
    \item $H_0\!: \beta = 0$ --- the evaluator extracts \emph{no signal} from true coding ability.
    \item $H_0\!: \beta = 1$ --- the evaluator is \emph{perfectly calibrated}: a $1$ SD rise in true ability produces exactly a $1$ SD rise in the rating, with no shrinkage.
\end{itemize}

```{r blind_hiring_signal_extraction, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
## Pooled z-score of the lab coding score (constant within resume_index)
firm_long_dt[, true_coding_z := (overall_score - mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                                  sd(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]

## Two pooled interacted regressions --- one per role. Since treat is
## between-respondent, responseid FE absorbs the main effect of treat but
## leaves both the main slope on true_coding_z (identified from within-
## respondent variation, by definition the nonblind arm's slope since
## nonblind is the reference) and the interaction slope identifiable.
m_hr  <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
  feols(sc_coding_z ~ true_coding_z * i(treat, ref = "nonblind")
        | responseid + r_do,
        data = firm_long_dt[role == "HR"],
        vcov = ~ responseid)
))
m_eng <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
  feols(sc_coding_z ~ true_coding_z * i(treat, ref = "nonblind")
        | responseid + r_do,
        data = firm_long_dt[role == "Eng"],
        vcov = ~ responseid)
))

## Extract arm-specific slopes, SEs, and the four tests (H0: beta = 0 / 1
## for each arm) from a single pooled model. beta_nonblind = main coef;
## beta_blind = main + interaction; SE(beta_blind) via linear-combination
## formula using the full vcov matrix.
extract_stats <- function(m) {
  ct    <- coeftable(m)
  V     <- vcov(m)
  main_name <- "true_coding_z"
  int_name  <- "true_coding_z:treat::blind"

  b_main <- ct[main_name, "Estimate"]
  s_main <- ct[main_name, "Std. Error"]
  b_int  <- ct[int_name,  "Estimate"]
  s_int  <- ct[int_name,  "Std. Error"]
  cov_mi <- V[main_name, int_name]

  b_nb <- b_main
  s_nb <- s_main
  b_b  <- b_main + b_int
  s_b  <- sqrt(s_main^2 + s_int^2 + 2 * cov_mi)

  pval <- function(t) 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(t)))
  p_nb_0 <- pval(b_nb / s_nb)
  p_nb_1 <- pval((b_nb - 1) / s_nb)
  p_b_0  <- pval(b_b  / s_b)
  p_b_1  <- pval((b_b  - 1) / s_b)
  ## H0: beta_blind = beta_nonblind is the same as H0: beta_interaction = 0,
  ## so we read its p-value directly off the interaction coefficient.
  p_eq   <- ct[int_name, 4]

  fs <- fitstat(m, c("r2", "ar2"), simplify = TRUE)
  list(b_nb = unname(b_nb), s_nb = unname(s_nb),
       b_b  = unname(b_b),  s_b  = unname(s_b),
       p_nb_0 = p_nb_0, p_nb_1 = p_nb_1,
       p_b_0  = p_b_0,  p_b_1  = p_b_1,
       p_eq   = unname(p_eq),
       n = m$nobs, r2 = unname(fs["r2"]), ar2 = unname(fs["ar2"]))
}

s_hr  <- extract_stats(m_hr)
s_eng <- extract_stats(m_eng)

## Formatting helpers.
sig_stars <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p))        ""
  else if (p < 0.01)   "***"
  else if (p < 0.05)   "**"
  else if (p < 0.10)   "*"
  else                 ""
}
fmt_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return("")
  pstr <- if (p < 0.001) "$<\\!0.001$" else sprintf("%.3f", p)
  paste0("p = ", pstr, sig_stars(p))
}

chk <- "\\checkmark"
nox <- "$\\times$"

cell_col <- function(s) c(
  sprintf("%.3f~(%.3f)", s$b_nb, s$s_nb),
  sprintf("%.3f~(%.3f)", s$b_b,  s$s_b),
  format(s$n,   big.mark = ","),
  sprintf("%.3f", s$r2),
  sprintf("%.3f", s$ar2),
  nox, chk, chk, nox
)

tbl <- data.frame(
  lbl = c("$\\hat\\beta_{\\text{nonblind}}$ (slope, nonblind arm)",
          "$\\hat\\beta_{\\text{blind}}$ (slope, blind arm)",
          "Observations",
          "$R^2$",
          "Adj. $R^2$",
          "Resume (Content) FE",
          "Display Position FE",
          "Respondent FE",
          "Respondent Characteristics"),
  HR  = cell_col(s_hr),
  Eng = cell_col(s_eng),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  check.names = FALSE
)
names(tbl) <- c(" ", "HR", "Engineer")

## Build the plot and save it to disk so we can include it via
## \includegraphics inside a LaTeX minipage layout.
plot_data <- data.frame(
  role = factor(c("HR", "HR", "Engineer", "Engineer"),
                levels = c("HR", "Engineer")),
  arm  = factor(c("Nonblind", "Blind", "Nonblind", "Blind"),
                levels = c("Nonblind", "Blind")),
  est  = c(s_hr$b_nb,  s_hr$b_b,  s_eng$b_nb, s_eng$b_b),
  se   = c(s_hr$s_nb,  s_hr$s_b,  s_eng$s_nb, s_eng$s_b)
)
plot_data$ci_lo <- plot_data$est - 1.96 * plot_data$se
plot_data$ci_hi <- plot_data$est + 1.96 * plot_data$se

p_signal <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = est, y = arm, color = arm)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ci_lo, xmax = ci_hi), height = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ role, ncol = 1, strip.position = "left") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.05, 1.1), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Nonblind" = "#d62728", "Blind" = "#1f77b4")) +
  labs(x = expression(hat(beta)*": slope of evaluator rating on true coding ability"),
       y = NULL, color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, face = "bold"))

## Save plot to disk so we can include it via \includegraphics inside a
## LaTeX minipage (table on left, plot on right).
fig_dir <- here("2_Reports", "figures")
if (!dir.exists(fig_dir)) dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)
plot_file <- file.path(fig_dir, "8B_signal_extraction.pdf")
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
  ggsave(plot_file, plot = p_signal, width = 4.5, height = 2.6, device = "pdf")
))

cat("\\begin{table}[H]\n")
cat("\\centering\n")
cat("\\begin{minipage}[c]{0.50\\textwidth}\n")
cat("\\centering\n")
cat("{\\fontsize{7}{9}\\selectfont\n")

## Plain kable + row_spec (no kable_styling, since kable_styling adds an
## inner \\begin{table} wrapper that LaTeX rejects inside a minipage).
print(
  kable(tbl, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, escape = FALSE,
        align = "lcc", row.names = FALSE) %>%
    row_spec(2, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule") %>%
    row_spec(5, extra_latex_after = "\\midrule")
)

cat("}\n")
cat("\\end{minipage}%\n")
cat("\\begin{minipage}[c]{0.48\\textwidth}\n")
cat("\\centering\n")
cat("\\includegraphics[width=\\textwidth]{", plot_file, "}\n", sep = "")
cat("\\end{minipage}\n")

cat("\\par\\vspace{0.4em}\n")
cat("\\noindent\\begin{minipage}{0.98\\textwidth}\\scriptsize\n")
cat("Cluster-robust standard errors (by respondent) shown in parentheses next to each $\\hat\\beta$.\\\\\n")
cat("Stars on p-values: * $p<0.10$, ** $p<0.05$, *** $p<0.01$.\n")
cat("\\end{minipage}\n")
cat("\\end{table}\n\n")

rm(m_hr, m_eng, s_hr, s_eng,
   extract_stats, sig_stars, fmt_p, cell_col,
   chk, nox, tbl, plot_data, p_signal, plot_file, fig_dir)
```

```{r prod_het_table_helper, echo=FALSE}
## Vectorised cell formatter for the per-k underlying-data tables in
## sections 4.2-4.6: prints "estimate*** (se)" with two-sided z-test
## stars (* p<.10, ** p<.05, *** p<.01). NA inputs render as "---".
## Defined in its own chunk so it survives the per-section rm() calls.
fmt_te_vec <- function(est, se) {
  out <- rep("---", length(est))
  ok  <- !is.na(est) & !is.na(se) & se > 0
  if (any(ok)) {
    z    <- est[ok] / se[ok]
    p    <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(z))
    star <- ifelse(p < 0.01, "***",
            ifelse(p < 0.05, "**",
            ifelse(p < 0.10, "*", "")))
    out[ok] <- sprintf("%.3f%s (%.3f)", est[ok], star, se[ok])
  }
  out
}
```

\clearpage
## Does Blinding Lead to Selection of More Productive Coders?

\textbf{Takeaway:} Blind hiring has a \emph{null} effect on the actual coding quality of the hired cohort.

```{r blind_hiring_coding_quality, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

# ==============================================================================
# HELPER: Dynamic standardization relative to nonblind group at each k
# ==============================================================================
get_avg_coding_score <- function(role_filter, treat_filter, k, 
                                  pass_var_prefix, data) {
  col <- paste0(pass_var_prefix, k)
  d   <- data[role == role_filter & treat == treat_filter & get(col) == 1]
  if (nrow(d) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  mean(d$overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)
}

# ==============================================================================
# COMPUTE TREATMENT EFFECT AT EACH K
# ==============================================================================
results_list <- list()

for (k in 1:18) {

  # --- HR ---
  hr_col  <- paste0("hr_pass", k)
  hr_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "HR" & get(hr_col) == 1]

  # Dynamic standardization: relative to nonblind mean/sd at this k
  ctrl_mean_hr <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_hr   <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_hr) && ctrl_sd_hr > 0) {
    hr_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_hr) / ctrl_sd_hr]

    tryCatch({
      m_hr <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income,
              data = hr_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      ct <- coeftable(m_hr)
      if ("treat::blind" %in% rownames(ct)) {
        est   <- ct["treat::blind", "Estimate"]
        se    <- ct["treat::blind", "Std. Error"]
        p_val <- ct["treat::blind", 4]
        results_list[[length(results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
          Stage = "HR Stage", k = k,
          estimate = est,
          ci_low   = est - 1.96 * se,
          ci_high  = est + 1.96 * se,
          p_val    = p_val
        )
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }

  # --- Engineer ---
  eng_col  <- paste0("eng_top", k)
  eng_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "Eng" & get(eng_col) == 1]

  ctrl_mean_eng <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_eng   <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_eng) && ctrl_sd_eng > 0) {
    eng_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_eng) / ctrl_sd_eng]

    tryCatch({
      m_eng <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income +
                resp_python + resp_java,
              data = eng_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      ct <- coeftable(m_eng)
      if ("treat::blind" %in% rownames(ct)) {
        est   <- ct["treat::blind", "Estimate"]
        se    <- ct["treat::blind", "Std. Error"]
        p_val <- ct["treat::blind", 4]
        results_list[[length(results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
          Stage = "Engineer Stage", k = k,
          estimate = est,
          ci_low   = est - 1.96 * se,
          ci_high  = est + 1.96 * se,
          p_val    = p_val
        )
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }
}

dt_plot <- rbindlist(results_list)
dt_plot[, Stage := factor(Stage, levels = c("HR Stage", "Engineer Stage"))]
dt_plot[, sig_stars := fcase(
  p_val < 0.01, "***",
  p_val < 0.05, "**",
  p_val < 0.10, "*",
  default = ""
)]

# ==============================================================================
# PLOT
# ==============================================================================
p_obj <- ggplot(dt_plot, aes(x = k, y = estimate, color = Stage)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high),
                  linewidth = 0.8, size = 0.6, fatten = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(y = ci_high, label = sig_stars),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 5, color = "black", show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Stage, ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("HR Stage" = "#C44E52", "Engineer Stage" = "#4C72B0")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:18, name = "Number of Candidates Selected (k)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.3, 0.3)) +
  labs(
    subtitle = paste("Treatment effect on true productivity measure (coding lab evaluation)",
                     "of selected candidates, standardized relative to selected candidates",
                     "under no blinding at each k"),
    y       = "Effect on Actual Coding Score (SD, relative to nonblind)",
    caption = "Positive = blind hiring selects candidates with higher actual coding scores.\nSignificance: * p<0.10, ** p<0.05, *** p<0.01"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "none",
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
    plot.caption       = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0)
  )
print(p_obj)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Underlying per-k estimate table that drives the plot above.
## Cells: estimate*** (clustered SE). Rows = k; columns = HR vs Engineer.
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
dt_plot[, se   := (ci_high - estimate) / 1.96]
dt_plot[, cell := fmt_te_vec(estimate, se)]
tbl <- dcast(dt_plot, k ~ Stage, value.var = "cell")
setnames(tbl, "k", "$k$")

rm(results_list, dt_plot, tbl, p_obj, k,
   hr_col, hr_data, ctrl_mean_hr, ctrl_sd_hr, m_hr, ct,
   eng_col, eng_data, ctrl_mean_eng, ctrl_sd_eng, m_eng,
   est, se, p_val)
```


\clearpage
### Decomposition of Treatment Effect on Productivity

```{r blind_hiring_coding_quality_components, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=12}

components     <- c("test_case", "readability", "time_efficiency", "space_efficiency", "runtime")
component_lbls <- c(test_case        = "Test Cases",
                    readability      = "Readability",
                    time_efficiency  = "Time Efficiency",
                    space_efficiency = "Space Efficiency",
                    runtime          = "Runtime")

results_list <- list()

for (cmp in components) {
  for (k in 1:18) {

    ## --- HR ---
    hr_col  <- paste0("hr_pass", k)
    hr_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "HR" & get(hr_col) == 1 & !is.na(get(cmp))]
    ctrl_mean_hr <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(get(cmp), na.rm = TRUE)]
    ctrl_sd_hr   <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(get(cmp),   na.rm = TRUE)]
    if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_hr) && ctrl_sd_hr > 0) {
      hr_data[, std_outcome := (get(cmp) - ctrl_mean_hr) / ctrl_sd_hr]
      tryCatch({
        m_hr <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
          feols(std_outcome ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") + resp_age |
                  q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income,
                data = hr_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
        ))
        ct <- coeftable(m_hr)
        if ("treat::blind" %in% rownames(ct)) {
          est <- ct["treat::blind", "Estimate"]; se <- ct["treat::blind", "Std. Error"]; p_val <- ct["treat::blind", 4]
          results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
            component = component_lbls[cmp], Stage = "HR Stage", k = k,
            estimate = est, se = se,
            ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se, p_val = p_val
          )
        }
      }, error = function(e) {})
    }

    ## --- Engineer ---
    eng_col  <- paste0("eng_top", k)
    eng_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "Eng" & get(eng_col) == 1 & !is.na(get(cmp))]
    ctrl_mean_eng <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(get(cmp), na.rm = TRUE)]
    ctrl_sd_eng   <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(get(cmp),   na.rm = TRUE)]
    if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_eng) && ctrl_sd_eng > 0) {
      eng_data[, std_outcome := (get(cmp) - ctrl_mean_eng) / ctrl_sd_eng]
      tryCatch({
        m_eng <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
          feols(std_outcome ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") + resp_age |
                  q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income +
                  resp_python + resp_java,
                data = eng_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
        ))
        ct <- coeftable(m_eng)
        if ("treat::blind" %in% rownames(ct)) {
          est <- ct["treat::blind", "Estimate"]; se <- ct["treat::blind", "Std. Error"]; p_val <- ct["treat::blind", 4]
          results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
            component = component_lbls[cmp], Stage = "Engineer Stage", k = k,
            estimate = est, se = se,
            ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se, p_val = p_val
          )
        }
      }, error = function(e) {})
    }
  }
}

dt_plot <- rbindlist(results_list)
dt_plot[, Stage     := factor(Stage,     levels = c("HR Stage", "Engineer Stage"))]
dt_plot[, component := factor(component, levels = unname(component_lbls))]
dt_plot[, sig_stars := fcase(p_val < 0.01, "***", p_val < 0.05, "**", p_val < 0.10, "*", default = "")]

p_obj <- ggplot(dt_plot, aes(x = k, y = estimate, color = Stage)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high),
                  linewidth = 0.5, size = 0.4, fatten = 3) +
  ## Clamp the star's y-position to stay inside the y-axis cap so the star
  ## remains visible even when ci_high overshoots ±0.6.
  geom_text(aes(y = pmin(pmax(ci_high, -0.55), 0.55), label = sig_stars),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "black", show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(component ~ Stage) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("HR Stage" = "#C44E52", "Engineer Stage" = "#4C72B0"),
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:18, name = "Number of Candidates Selected (k)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.6, 0.6)) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "Per-component decomposition of TE on selected candidate quality (each component standardized per k relative to nonblind)",
    y       = "Effect on Component Score (SD, relative to nonblind)",
    caption = "Visibility: engineers see test_case directly; HR sees none. Readability / time / space are unobserved by both sides (latent lab measurements).\nSignificance: * p<0.10, ** p<0.05, *** p<0.01."
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray30"),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.caption       = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0)
  )
print(p_obj)

## Underlying per-k coefficient table.
dt_plot[, cell := fmt_te_vec(estimate, se)]
tbl <- dcast(dt_plot, k ~ component + Stage, value.var = "cell")
col_order <- c("k", as.vector(outer(c("HR Stage", "Engineer Stage"), unname(component_lbls),
                                     function(s, c) paste(c, s, sep = "_"))))
col_order <- intersect(col_order, names(tbl))
setcolorder(tbl, col_order)
disp <- c("$k$", rep(c("HR", "Eng"), times = length(components)))
setnames(tbl, col_order, disp[seq_along(col_order)])

rm(results_list, dt_plot, tbl, p_obj, components, component_lbls, col_order, disp,
   cmp, k, hr_col, hr_data, ctrl_mean_hr, ctrl_sd_hr, m_hr, ct,
   eng_col, eng_data, ctrl_mean_eng, ctrl_sd_eng, m_eng,
   est, se, p_val)
```


\clearpage
## Does Blinding's Productivity Effect Differ by Evaluator's DEI Orientation?

```{r blind_hiring_coding_quality_by_dei, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, out.width="0.95\\textwidth", fig.align="center"}

results_list <- list()
dei_pts <- c(-1, 0, 1)
dei_lbl <- c("Low DEI (-1 SD)", "Mid DEI (0)", "High DEI (+1 SD)")

for (k in 1:18) {

  ## --- HR ---
  hr_col  <- paste0("hr_pass", k)
  hr_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "HR" & get(hr_col) == 1]
  ctrl_mean_hr <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_hr   <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_hr) && ctrl_sd_hr > 0) {
    hr_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_hr) / ctrl_sd_hr]

    tryCatch({
      m_hr <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") * dei_index_z + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income,
              data = hr_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      cf <- coef(m_hr); V <- vcov(m_hr)
      idx_main <- match("treat::blind", names(cf))
      idx_int  <- match("dei_index_z:treat::blind", names(cf))
      if (!is.na(idx_main) && !is.na(idx_int)) {
        for (j in seq_along(dei_pts)) {
          q <- dei_pts[j]
          v <- numeric(length(cf))
          v[idx_main] <- 1; v[idx_int] <- q
          est <- sum(v * cf); se <- sqrt(c(v %*% V %*% v))
          results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
            Stage = "HR Stage", k = k, dei_level = dei_lbl[j],
            estimate = est, ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se,
            p_val = 2 * pnorm(-abs(est / se))
          )
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }

  ## --- Engineer ---
  eng_col  <- paste0("eng_top", k)
  eng_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "Eng" & get(eng_col) == 1]
  ctrl_mean_eng <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_eng   <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_eng) && ctrl_sd_eng > 0) {
    eng_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_eng) / ctrl_sd_eng]

    tryCatch({
      m_eng <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") * dei_index_z + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income +
                resp_python + resp_java,
              data = eng_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      cf <- coef(m_eng); V <- vcov(m_eng)
      idx_main <- match("treat::blind", names(cf))
      idx_int  <- match("dei_index_z:treat::blind", names(cf))
      if (!is.na(idx_main) && !is.na(idx_int)) {
        for (j in seq_along(dei_pts)) {
          q <- dei_pts[j]
          v <- numeric(length(cf))
          v[idx_main] <- 1; v[idx_int] <- q
          est <- sum(v * cf); se <- sqrt(c(v %*% V %*% v))
          results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
            Stage = "Engineer Stage", k = k, dei_level = dei_lbl[j],
            estimate = est, ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se,
            p_val = 2 * pnorm(-abs(est / se))
          )
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }
}

dt_plot <- rbindlist(results_list)
dt_plot[, Stage := factor(Stage, levels = c("HR Stage", "Engineer Stage"))]
dt_plot[, dei_level := factor(dei_level, levels = dei_lbl)]

p_obj <- ggplot(dt_plot, aes(x = k, y = estimate, color = dei_level, fill = dei_level)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), alpha = 0.18, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.3) +
  facet_grid(dei_level ~ Stage) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low DEI (-1 SD)"  = "#D9534F",
                                "Mid DEI (0)"      = "gray40",
                                "High DEI (+1 SD)" = "#4C72B0"),
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("Low DEI (-1 SD)"  = "#D9534F",
                                "Mid DEI (0)"      = "gray40",
                                "High DEI (+1 SD)" = "#4C72B0"),
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:18, name = "Number of Candidates Selected (k)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.3, 0.3)) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "TE on hired candidates' actual coding score, by respondent's DEI index level",
    y       = "Effect on Actual Coding Score (SD, relative to nonblind)",
    caption = "Rows: TE evaluated at -1, 0, +1 SD of the within-role z-scored DEI index. Columns: HR vs Engineer. Bands: 95% CI from the linear combination of treat::blind and treat::blind:dei_index_z."
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
    plot.caption       = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0)
  )
print(p_obj)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Underlying per-k estimate table: rows = k, cols = HR/Eng x DEI level.
## Cells: estimate*** (clustered SE) from the linear combination at each
## (k, role, DEI point). add_header_above splits HR vs Engineer.
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
dt_plot[, se   := (ci_high - estimate) / 1.96]
dt_plot[, cell := fmt_te_vec(estimate, se)]
tbl <- dcast(dt_plot, k ~ Stage + dei_level, value.var = "cell")
col_order <- c("k",
  "HR Stage_Low DEI (-1 SD)",       "HR Stage_Mid DEI (0)",       "HR Stage_High DEI (+1 SD)",
  "Engineer Stage_Low DEI (-1 SD)", "Engineer Stage_Mid DEI (0)", "Engineer Stage_High DEI (+1 SD)")
col_order <- intersect(col_order, names(tbl))
setcolorder(tbl, col_order)
disp <- c("$k$",
  "Low (-1 SD)", "Mid (0)", "High (+1 SD)",
  "Low (-1 SD)", "Mid (0)", "High (+1 SD)")
setnames(tbl, col_order, disp[seq_along(col_order)])

rm(results_list, dt_plot, tbl, p_obj, dei_pts, dei_lbl, col_order, disp, k,
   hr_col, hr_data, ctrl_mean_hr, ctrl_sd_hr, m_hr,
   eng_col, eng_data, ctrl_mean_eng, ctrl_sd_eng, m_eng,
   cf, V, idx_main, idx_int, est, se, q, v, j)
```


\clearpage
## Does Blinding's Productivity Effect Differ by Firm DEI-Targeting Policy?

```{r blind_hiring_coding_quality_by_firmtarget, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}

results_list <- list()
ft_pts <- c(0, 1)
ft_lbl <- c("Firm does NOT target Fem/His", "Firm DOES target Fem/His")

## Build firm_targets_fh on firm_long_dt if not already present.
if (!"firm_targets_fh" %in% names(firm_long_dt)) {
  firm_long_dt[, firm_targets_fh := as.integer(
    firm_targets_female == 1L | firm_targets_hispanic == 1L)]
}

for (k in 1:18) {

  ## --- HR ---
  hr_col  <- paste0("hr_pass", k)
  hr_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "HR" & get(hr_col) == 1 & !is.na(firm_targets_fh)]
  ctrl_mean_hr <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_hr   <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_hr) && ctrl_sd_hr > 0) {
    hr_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_hr) / ctrl_sd_hr]

    tryCatch({
      m_hr <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") * firm_targets_fh + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income,
              data = hr_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      cf <- coef(m_hr); V <- vcov(m_hr)
      idx_main <- match("treat::blind", names(cf))
      idx_int  <- match("firm_targets_fh:treat::blind", names(cf))
      if (!is.na(idx_main) && !is.na(idx_int)) {
        for (j in seq_along(ft_pts)) {
          q <- ft_pts[j]
          v <- numeric(length(cf))
          v[idx_main] <- 1; v[idx_int] <- q
          est <- sum(v * cf); se <- sqrt(c(v %*% V %*% v))
          results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
            Stage = "HR Stage", k = k, ft_level = ft_lbl[j],
            estimate = est, ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se
          )
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }

  ## --- Engineer ---
  eng_col  <- paste0("eng_top", k)
  eng_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "Eng" & get(eng_col) == 1 & !is.na(firm_targets_fh)]
  ctrl_mean_eng <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_eng   <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_eng) && ctrl_sd_eng > 0) {
    eng_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_eng) / ctrl_sd_eng]

    tryCatch({
      m_eng <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") * firm_targets_fh + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income +
                resp_python + resp_java,
              data = eng_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      cf <- coef(m_eng); V <- vcov(m_eng)
      idx_main <- match("treat::blind", names(cf))
      idx_int  <- match("firm_targets_fh:treat::blind", names(cf))
      if (!is.na(idx_main) && !is.na(idx_int)) {
        for (j in seq_along(ft_pts)) {
          q <- ft_pts[j]
          v <- numeric(length(cf))
          v[idx_main] <- 1; v[idx_int] <- q
          est <- sum(v * cf); se <- sqrt(c(v %*% V %*% v))
          results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
            Stage = "Engineer Stage", k = k, ft_level = ft_lbl[j],
            estimate = est, ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se
          )
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }
}

dt_plot <- rbindlist(results_list)
dt_plot[, Stage := factor(Stage, levels = c("HR Stage", "Engineer Stage"))]
dt_plot[, ft_level := factor(ft_level, levels = ft_lbl)]

p_obj <- ggplot(dt_plot, aes(x = k, y = estimate, color = ft_level, fill = ft_level)) +
```
