```{r blind_hiring_coding_quality_by_firmtarget, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), alpha = 0.18, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.3) +
  facet_grid(ft_level ~ Stage) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Firm does NOT target Fem/His" = "#D9534F",
                                "Firm DOES target Fem/His"     = "#4C72B0"),
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("Firm does NOT target Fem/His" = "#D9534F",
                                "Firm DOES target Fem/His"     = "#4C72B0"),
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:18, name = "Number of Candidates Selected (k)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.3, 0.3)) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "TE on hired candidates' actual coding score, by firm DEI-targeting policy",
    y       = "Effect on Actual Coding Score (SD, relative to nonblind)",
    caption = "Rows: firm DOES vs does NOT formally target Female or Hispanic candidates. Columns: HR vs Engineer. Bands: 95% CI."
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
    plot.caption       = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0)
  )
print(p_obj)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Underlying per-k estimate table: rows = k, cols = HR/Eng x firm-target
## (No / Yes). Cells: estimate*** (clustered SE).
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
dt_plot[, se   := (ci_high - estimate) / 1.96]
dt_plot[, cell := fmt_te_vec(estimate, se)]
tbl <- dcast(dt_plot, k ~ Stage + ft_level, value.var = "cell")
col_order <- c("k",
  "HR Stage_Firm does NOT target Fem/His",       "HR Stage_Firm DOES target Fem/His",
  "Engineer Stage_Firm does NOT target Fem/His", "Engineer Stage_Firm DOES target Fem/His")
col_order <- intersect(col_order, names(tbl))
setcolorder(tbl, col_order)
disp <- c("$k$",
  "Does NOT target", "DOES target",
  "Does NOT target", "DOES target")
setnames(tbl, col_order, disp[seq_along(col_order)])

rm(results_list, dt_plot, tbl, p_obj, ft_pts, ft_lbl, col_order, disp, k,
   hr_col, hr_data, ctrl_mean_hr, ctrl_sd_hr, m_hr,
   eng_col, eng_data, ctrl_mean_eng, ctrl_sd_eng, m_eng,
   cf, V, idx_main, idx_int, est, se, q, v, j)
```


\clearpage
## Does Blinding's Productivity Effect Differ by Inter-Departmental DEI Misalignment?

```{r blind_hiring_coding_quality_by_misalign, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, out.width="0.95\\textwidth", fig.align="center"}

results_list <- list()
ms_pts <- c(-1, 0, 1)
ms_lbl <- c("Low Misalign (-1 SD)", "Mid Misalign (0)", "High Misalign (+1 SD)")

for (k in 1:18) {

  ## --- HR ---
  hr_col  <- paste0("hr_pass", k)
  hr_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "HR" & get(hr_col) == 1 & !is.na(misalign_z)]
  ctrl_mean_hr <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_hr   <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_hr) && ctrl_sd_hr > 0) {
    hr_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_hr) / ctrl_sd_hr]

    tryCatch({
      m_hr <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") * misalign_z + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income,
              data = hr_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      cf <- coef(m_hr); V <- vcov(m_hr)
      idx_main <- match("treat::blind", names(cf))
      idx_int  <- match("misalign_z:treat::blind", names(cf))
      if (!is.na(idx_main) && !is.na(idx_int)) {
        for (j in seq_along(ms_pts)) {
          q <- ms_pts[j]
          v <- numeric(length(cf))
          v[idx_main] <- 1; v[idx_int] <- q
          est <- sum(v * cf); se <- sqrt(c(v %*% V %*% v))
          results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
            Stage = "HR Stage", k = k, ms_level = ms_lbl[j],
            estimate = est, ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se
          )
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }

  ## --- Engineer ---
  eng_col  <- paste0("eng_top", k)
  eng_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "Eng" & get(eng_col) == 1 & !is.na(misalign_z)]
  ctrl_mean_eng <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_eng   <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_eng) && ctrl_sd_eng > 0) {
    eng_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_eng) / ctrl_sd_eng]

    tryCatch({
      m_eng <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") * misalign_z + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income +
                resp_python + resp_java,
              data = eng_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      cf <- coef(m_eng); V <- vcov(m_eng)
      idx_main <- match("treat::blind", names(cf))
      idx_int  <- match("misalign_z:treat::blind", names(cf))
      if (!is.na(idx_main) && !is.na(idx_int)) {
        for (j in seq_along(ms_pts)) {
          q <- ms_pts[j]
          v <- numeric(length(cf))
          v[idx_main] <- 1; v[idx_int] <- q
          est <- sum(v * cf); se <- sqrt(c(v %*% V %*% v))
          results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
            Stage = "Engineer Stage", k = k, ms_level = ms_lbl[j],
            estimate = est, ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se
          )
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }
}

dt_plot <- rbindlist(results_list)
dt_plot[, Stage := factor(Stage, levels = c("HR Stage", "Engineer Stage"))]
dt_plot[, ms_level := factor(ms_level, levels = ms_lbl)]

p_obj <- ggplot(dt_plot, aes(x = k, y = estimate, color = ms_level, fill = ms_level)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), alpha = 0.18, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.3) +
  facet_grid(ms_level ~ Stage) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low Misalign (-1 SD)"  = "#5BC0DE",
                                "Mid Misalign (0)"       = "gray40",
                                "High Misalign (+1 SD)"  = "#D9534F"),
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("Low Misalign (-1 SD)"  = "#5BC0DE",
                                "Mid Misalign (0)"       = "gray40",
                                "High Misalign (+1 SD)"  = "#D9534F"),
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:18, name = "Number of Candidates Selected (k)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.3, 0.3)) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "TE on hired candidates' actual coding score, by signed directional misalignment index",
    y       = "Effect on Actual Coding Score (SD, relative to nonblind)",
    caption = "Rows: TE evaluated at -1, 0, +1 SD of the within-role z-scored signed directional misalignment index from §3. Columns: HR vs Engineer. Bands: 95% CI."
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
    plot.caption       = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0)
  )
print(p_obj)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Underlying per-k estimate table: rows = k, cols = HR/Eng x misalign
## level. Cells: estimate*** (clustered SE).
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
dt_plot[, se   := (ci_high - estimate) / 1.96]
dt_plot[, cell := fmt_te_vec(estimate, se)]
tbl <- dcast(dt_plot, k ~ Stage + ms_level, value.var = "cell")
col_order <- c("k",
  "HR Stage_Low Misalign (-1 SD)",       "HR Stage_Mid Misalign (0)",       "HR Stage_High Misalign (+1 SD)",
  "Engineer Stage_Low Misalign (-1 SD)", "Engineer Stage_Mid Misalign (0)", "Engineer Stage_High Misalign (+1 SD)")
col_order <- intersect(col_order, names(tbl))
setcolorder(tbl, col_order)
disp <- c("$k$",
  "Low (-1 SD)", "Mid (0)", "High (+1 SD)",
  "Low (-1 SD)", "Mid (0)", "High (+1 SD)")
setnames(tbl, col_order, disp[seq_along(col_order)])

rm(results_list, dt_plot, tbl, p_obj, ms_pts, ms_lbl, col_order, disp, k,
   hr_col, hr_data, ctrl_mean_hr, ctrl_sd_hr, m_hr,
   eng_col, eng_data, ctrl_mean_eng, ctrl_sd_eng, m_eng,
   cf, V, idx_main, idx_int, est, se, q, v, j)
```


\clearpage
## Does Blinding's Productivity Effect Vary Jointly by DEI Orientation and Inter-Departmental Misalignment?

```{r blind_hiring_coding_quality_by_dei_x_misalign, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, out.width="0.95\\textwidth", fig.align="center"}

results_list <- list()
dei_pts <- c(-1, 0, 1)
dei_lbl <- c("Low DEI (-1 SD)", "Mid DEI (0)", "High DEI (+1 SD)")
ms_pts  <- c(-1, 0, 1)
ms_lbl  <- c("Low Misalign (-1 SD)", "Mid Misalign (0)", "High Misalign (+1 SD)")

for (k in 1:18) {

  ## --- HR ---
  hr_col  <- paste0("hr_pass", k)
  hr_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "HR" & get(hr_col) == 1 &
                          !is.na(dei_index_z) & !is.na(misalign_z)]
  ctrl_mean_hr <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_hr   <- hr_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_hr) && ctrl_sd_hr > 0) {
    hr_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_hr) / ctrl_sd_hr]

    tryCatch({
      m_hr <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") * dei_index_z * misalign_z + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income,
              data = hr_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      cf <- coef(m_hr); V <- vcov(m_hr)
      idx_main <- match("treat::blind",                        names(cf))
      idx_dei  <- match("dei_index_z:treat::blind",            names(cf))
      idx_ms   <- match("misalign_z:treat::blind",             names(cf))
      idx_dms  <- match("dei_index_z:misalign_z:treat::blind", names(cf))
      if (!is.na(idx_main)) {
        for (jd in seq_along(dei_pts)) {
          for (jm in seq_along(ms_pts)) {
            d <- dei_pts[jd]; mm <- ms_pts[jm]
            v <- numeric(length(cf))
            v[idx_main] <- 1
            if (!is.na(idx_dei)) v[idx_dei] <- d
            if (!is.na(idx_ms))  v[idx_ms]  <- mm
            if (!is.na(idx_dms)) v[idx_dms] <- d * mm
            est <- sum(v * cf); se <- sqrt(c(v %*% V %*% v))
            results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
              Stage = "HR Stage", k = k,
              dei_level = dei_lbl[jd], ms_level = ms_lbl[jm],
              estimate = est, ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se
            )
          }
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }

  ## --- Engineer ---
  eng_col  <- paste0("eng_top", k)
  eng_data <- firm_long_dt[role == "Eng" & get(eng_col) == 1 &
                           !is.na(dei_index_z) & !is.na(misalign_z)]
  ctrl_mean_eng <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", mean(overall_score, na.rm = TRUE)]
  ctrl_sd_eng   <- eng_data[treat == "nonblind", sd(overall_score,   na.rm = TRUE)]

  if (!is.na(ctrl_sd_eng) && ctrl_sd_eng > 0) {
    eng_data[, overall_score_std := (overall_score - ctrl_mean_eng) / ctrl_sd_eng]

    tryCatch({
      m_eng <- suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        feols(overall_score_std ~ i(treat, ref = "nonblind") * dei_index_z * misalign_z + resp_age |
                q_version + resp_gender + resp_race + s2_educ + s2_income +
                resp_python + resp_java,
              data = eng_data, vcov = ~ responseid)
      ))
      cf <- coef(m_eng); V <- vcov(m_eng)
      idx_main <- match("treat::blind",                        names(cf))
      idx_dei  <- match("dei_index_z:treat::blind",            names(cf))
      idx_ms   <- match("misalign_z:treat::blind",             names(cf))
      idx_dms  <- match("dei_index_z:misalign_z:treat::blind", names(cf))
      if (!is.na(idx_main)) {
        for (jd in seq_along(dei_pts)) {
          for (jm in seq_along(ms_pts)) {
            d <- dei_pts[jd]; mm <- ms_pts[jm]
            v <- numeric(length(cf))
            v[idx_main] <- 1
            if (!is.na(idx_dei)) v[idx_dei] <- d
            if (!is.na(idx_ms))  v[idx_ms]  <- mm
            if (!is.na(idx_dms)) v[idx_dms] <- d * mm
            est <- sum(v * cf); se <- sqrt(c(v %*% V %*% v))
            results_list[[length(results_list) + 1L]] <- data.table(
              Stage = "Engineer Stage", k = k,
              dei_level = dei_lbl[jd], ms_level = ms_lbl[jm],
              estimate = est, ci_low = est - 1.96 * se, ci_high = est + 1.96 * se
            )
          }
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {})
  }
}

dt_plot <- rbindlist(results_list)
dt_plot[, Stage     := factor(Stage,     levels = c("HR Stage", "Engineer Stage"))]
dt_plot[, dei_level := factor(dei_level, levels = dei_lbl)]
dt_plot[, ms_level  := factor(ms_level,  levels = ms_lbl)]

p_obj <- ggplot(dt_plot, aes(x = k, y = estimate, color = dei_level, fill = dei_level)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.1) +
  facet_grid(ms_level ~ Stage) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low DEI (-1 SD)"  = "#D9534F",
                                "Mid DEI (0)"      = "gray40",
                                "High DEI (+1 SD)" = "#4C72B0"),
                     name = "Respondent DEI Index") +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("Low DEI (-1 SD)"  = "#D9534F",
                                "Mid DEI (0)"      = "gray40",
                                "High DEI (+1 SD)" = "#4C72B0"),
                     name = "Respondent DEI Index") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:18, name = "Number of Candidates Selected (k)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.4, 0.4)) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "TE on hired candidates' actual coding score, by DEI index x signed directional misalignment",
    y       = "Effect on Actual Coding Score (SD, relative to nonblind)",
    caption = "Rows: misalignment index at -1/0/+1 SD. Columns: HR vs Engineer. Within panel: respondent DEI index at -1/0/+1 SD. Bands: 95% CI from v' Sigma v with v selecting (treat::blind, treat::blind:dei_z, treat::blind:misalign_z, treat::blind:dei_z:misalign_z); coefs dropped for collinearity are treated as constrained to zero. Y-cap +/-0.4 SD."
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 9),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
    plot.caption       = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0)
  )
print(p_obj)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Underlying per-k estimate table for the triple interaction.
## Rows = k. Columns: 18 cells per row (HR x 3 misalign x 3 DEI, then
## Eng x 3 misalign x 3 DEI). Two header rows group by Role (top) and
## by Misalign level (middle); the inner column labels are the DEI level.
## Cells: estimate*** (clustered SE).
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
dt_plot[, se   := (ci_high - estimate) / 1.96]
dt_plot[, cell := fmt_te_vec(estimate, se)]
tbl <- dcast(dt_plot, k ~ Stage + ms_level + dei_level, value.var = "cell")

stages_order <- c("HR Stage", "Engineer Stage")
ms_order     <- c("Low Misalign (-1 SD)", "Mid Misalign (0)", "High Misalign (+1 SD)")
dei_order    <- c("Low DEI (-1 SD)",      "Mid DEI (0)",      "High DEI (+1 SD)")
col_order <- c("k",
  unlist(lapply(stages_order, function(st)
    unlist(lapply(ms_order, function(ms)
      paste(st, ms, dei_order, sep = "_"))))))
col_order <- intersect(col_order, names(tbl))
setcolorder(tbl, col_order)
disp <- c("$k$", rep(c("L", "M", "H"), times = 6))
setnames(tbl, col_order, disp[seq_along(col_order)])

rm(results_list, dt_plot, tbl, p_obj,
   dei_pts, dei_lbl, ms_pts, ms_lbl,
   stages_order, ms_order, dei_order, col_order, disp, k,
   hr_col, hr_data, ctrl_mean_hr, ctrl_sd_hr, m_hr,
   eng_col, eng_data, ctrl_mean_eng, ctrl_sd_eng, m_eng,
   cf, V, idx_main, idx_dei, idx_ms, idx_dms,
   est, se, d, mm, v, jd, jm)
```
